expected.notes: Student has pending change of status but is not planning travel, so rule must not fire despite satisfying the pending_status_change condition.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'travel_during_pending_cos', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.planning_travel eq yes
  - answers.pending_status_change eq yes
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
